summary: Iteration 12 - AI³ NLP Interface & Advanced Operations Testing. Backend: 20/21 tests passed (1 skipped due to known route conflict). Frontend: All 14 AI³ panel UI elements verified working. Fixed MongoDB duplicate key error in ai3_nlp.py. LLM integration working correctly with Gemini via emergentintegrations.

minor.issue: Route conflict with /api/properties/{property_id} - the generic route catches 'transfer-orders' as a property_id, returning 404 'Property not found'
minor.fix_suggestion: Reorder routes in server.py to include advanced_ops_router before intelligence_router, or change path to /api/transfer-orders

action_items: Fix route conflict: /api/properties/transfer-orders is caught by /api/properties/{property_id} - reorder routers or change path
critical_code_review_comments: ai3_nlp.py: Fixed MongoDB duplicate key error - removed '_id': None from insert_one, now uses auto-generated _id with custom 'id' field
ai3_nlp.py: LLM integration uses emergentintegrations with gpt-4.1-mini model, RBAC-aware context gathering
ai3_nlp.py: Role-based restrictions properly implemented for owner, gm, controller, exec_chef, director, manager, supervisor, staff, vendor
advanced_ops.py: IoT dashboard returns 8 sensors with proper alert detection (Walk-In Cooler B at 48.2°F flagged as alert)
advanced_ops.py: Overtime forecast calculates risk based on event load factor and current hours worked
advanced_ops.py: Energy dashboard provides consumption by outlet and type with cost estimates

AI3Intelligence/index.tsx: All 14 data-testid attributes present for testing (panel, topbar, user-selector, clearance, command-bar, cmd-input, cmd-send, query-pills, thread, intel-panel, iot-card, ot-card, energy-card, status-card)
panel-registry.ts: ai3-intelligence registered with 'high' priority for preloading
Sidebar.tsx: AI³ Intelligence nav item added under 'Analytics & AI' section with BrainCircuit icon
seed_data_creation: Test data created with TEST_ prefix: TEST_VIP_Guest (casino comp), TEST_Tech_Conference_2026 (convention), TEST_Olive_Oil transfer order
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 12 tested AI³ NLP interface and Advanced Ops endpoints. AI³ uses Gemini via emergentintegrations with RBAC-aware context. Fixed MongoDB _id issue in chat history. Route conflict exists: /api/properties/transfer-orders caught by /api/properties/{property_id}. All frontend UI elements have data-testid attributes. Intelligence cards show real-time IoT sensors (1 alert), overtime forecast ($213 projected), and energy consumption (37,100 kWh).

backend_tests.ai3_ask: PASS - POST /api/ai3/ask returns LLM response for usr-gm-001
backend_tests.iot_dashboard: PASS - Returns 8 sensors, 1 alert (Walk-In Cooler B)
backend_tests.overtime_forecast_default: PASS - Returns employees at risk with projected OT cost
backend_tests.energy_dashboard: PASS - Returns consumption by outlet and type
backend_tests.allergen_scanner_with_allergies: PASS - Returns safe/unsafe items for dairy,gluten
backend_tests.casino_comps_list: PASS - Returns comps with total value
backend_tests.casino_comps_create: PASS - Creates comp with calculated total
backend_tests.conventions_create: PASS - Creates convention with calendar events

frontend_tests.ai3_panel_opens: PASS - Panel opens when clicking nav item
frontend_tests.ai3_clearance: PASS - Shows 'CLEARANCE: OMEGA' for owner role
frontend_tests.ai3_query_pills: PASS - 6 pills found (Food Cost, Overtime Risk, Vendor Status, Beverage Variance, Event Demand, Compliance)
frontend_tests.ai3_iot_card: PASS - Shows IoT sensors with alert status
frontend_tests.ai3_ot_card: PASS - Shows overtime forecast with at-risk employees
frontend_tests.ai3_query_response: PASS - Clicking query pill sends request and shows LLM response
